summary: Implemented consistent error handling across all pages in RevenueForge

404_page.note: Branded 404 page already existed with proper design

api_error_card.note: ApiError and ErrorState components with retry button

network_offline_indicator.note: OfflineIndicator added to layout with ToastProvider

form_errors_inline.note: FormField, FormError, FormInput, FormTextarea, FormSelect with inline error display

toast_notifications.note: ToastProvider and useToast hook with animated toast UI for success/error/warning/info

files_created_or_modified: lib/api.ts (updated - added ApiError class and apiRequest wrapper)
testing_notes: TypeScript compiles without errors. All components properly exported and wired up.
